name: US500_M15_PullbackTrendContinuation
hypothesis: US500 M15 pullbacks to EMA(20) within an established EMA(50)>EMA(200) uptrend (or inverse for downtrend) during US cash session, confirmed by RSI(14) crossing back from <40 (longs) or >60 (shorts), produce high-expectancy continuation trades.

regime_filter.notes: Require mild trend confirmation; reject flat chop.

entry_rules.long: EMA(50)>EMA(200) AND low of prior 2 bars touched/crossed below EMA(20) AND current bar closes above EMA(20) AND RSI(14) crosses above 40 from below
entry_rules.short: EMA(50)<EMA(200) AND high of prior 2 bars touched/crossed above EMA(20) AND current bar closes below EMA(20) AND RSI(14) crosses below 60 from above

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.25 * ATR(14) below swing low (long) / above swing high (short)
exit_rules.trailing: Move to BE after +1.0 ATR; trail at EMA(20) after +1.8 ATR

falsifier: If PF<1.6 or trades<200 over 3yr or DD>15%, kill branch.
